fix_patch:
diff --git a/rtl/ibex_controller.sv b/rtl/ibex_controller.sv
index 5ee3a6ed..4f06394c 100644
--- a/rtl/ibex_controller.sv
+++ b/rtl/ibex_controller.sv
@@ -99,6 +99,7 @@ module ibex_controller #(
   // stall & flush signals
   input  logic                  stall_id_i,
   input  logic                  stall_wb_i,
+  input  logic                  pmp_csr_write_stall_i, // stall IF stage on PMP CSR write
   output logic                  flush_id_o,
   input  logic                  ready_wb_i,
 
@@ -850,7 +851,9 @@ module ibex_controller #(
   // If high current instruction cannot complete this cycle. Either because it needs more cycles to
   // finish (stall_id_i) or because the writeback stage cannot accept it yet (stall_wb_i). If there
   // is no writeback stage stall_wb_i is a constant 0.
-  assign stall = stall_id_i | stall_wb_i;
+  // pmp_csr_write_stall_i stalls the IF stage when a PMP CSR is being written, ensuring the next
+  // instruction fetch sees the updated PMP permissions rather than stale values.
+  assign stall = stall_id_i | stall_wb_i | pmp_csr_write_stall_i;
 
   // signal to IF stage that ID stage is ready for next instr
   assign id_in_ready_o = ~stall & ~halt_if & ~retain_id;
diff --git a/rtl/ibex_core.sv b/rtl/ibex_core.sv
index db4a92aa..6464038e 100644
--- a/rtl/ibex_core.sv
+++ b/rtl/ibex_core.sv
@@ -314,6 +314,31 @@ module ibex_core import ibex_pkg::*; #(
   logic         pmp_req_err  [PMPNumChan];
   logic         data_req_out;
 
+  // PMP CSR write stall: When a PMP CSR is being written, stall the IF stage to ensure the next
+  // instruction fetch uses updated PMP permissions. Without this, the next instruction could be
+  // fetched with stale PMP values, allowing execution from an address that should now be blocked.
+  // The stall is needed because the CSR update occurs on the clock edge, so the IF stage must wait
+  // until the next cycle to fetch with the new PMP values.
+  logic pmp_csr_write_stall;
+
+  // PMP CSR address ranges:
+  //   CSR_PMPCFG0-3:     0x3A0-0x3A3
+  //   CSR_PMPADDR0-15:   0x3B0-0x3BF
+  //   CSR_MSECCFG:       0x747
+  assign pmp_csr_write_stall = PMPEnable &&
+                               csr_access &&
+                               csr_op_en &&
+                               (csr_op != CSR_OP_READ) &&
+                               ((csr_addr inside {CSR_PMPCFG0, CSR_PMPCFG1, CSR_PMPCFG2,
+                                                  CSR_PMPCFG3}) ||
+                                (csr_addr inside {CSR_PMPADDR0, CSR_PMPADDR1, CSR_PMPADDR2,
+                                                  CSR_PMPADDR3, CSR_PMPADDR4, CSR_PMPADDR5,
+                                                  CSR_PMPADDR6, CSR_PMPADDR7, CSR_PMPADDR8,
+                                                  CSR_PMPADDR9, CSR_PMPADDR10, CSR_PMPADDR11,
+                                                  CSR_PMPADDR12, CSR_PMPADDR13, CSR_PMPADDR14,
+                                                  CSR_PMPADDR15}) ||
+                                (csr_addr == CSR_MSECCFG));
+
   logic        csr_save_if;
   logic        csr_save_id;
   logic        csr_save_wb;
@@ -542,6 +567,7 @@ module ibex_core import ibex_pkg::*; #(
     // Stalls
     .ex_valid_i      (ex_valid),
     .lsu_resp_valid_i(lsu_resp_valid),
+    .pmp_csr_write_stall_i(pmp_csr_write_stall),
 
     .alu_operator_ex_o (alu_operator_ex),
     .alu_operand_a_ex_o(alu_operand_a_ex),
diff --git a/rtl/ibex_id_stage.sv b/rtl/ibex_id_stage.sv
index a1c9c0f8..cb30a9dc 100644
--- a/rtl/ibex_id_stage.sv
+++ b/rtl/ibex_id_stage.sv
@@ -66,6 +66,7 @@ module ibex_id_stage #(
   // Stalls
   input  logic                      ex_valid_i,       // EX stage has valid output
   input  logic                      lsu_resp_valid_i, // LSU has valid output, or is done
+  input  logic                      pmp_csr_write_stall_i, // stall IF stage on PMP CSR write
   // ALU
   output ibex_pkg::alu_op_e         alu_operator_ex_o,
   output logic [31:0]               alu_operand_a_ex_o,
@@ -626,6 +627,7 @@ module ibex_id_stage #(
 
     .stall_id_i(stall_id),
     .stall_wb_i(stall_wb),
+    .pmp_csr_write_stall_i(pmp_csr_write_stall_i),
     .flush_id_o(flush_id),
     .ready_wb_i(ready_wb_i),
